title: heater operation
description: Operation block of a credo-pure single-stream heater.  Hardware-only: specify the absolute thermal power Q (W or kW; positive = heating, negative = cooling).  The outlet temperature T_out is a RESULT of the enthalpy balance, not a spec.  For 'I need T_out = X' wrap the unit in a DesignSpec outerDict that manipulates $Q with a target on this unit's T_out KPI.

Q.title: Thermal power (hardware)
Q.description: Absolute thermal power delivered to the stream.  Positive heats, negative cools.  Think of it as the electrical rating of the heater or the firing rate of a burner.

Tref.title: Enthalpy reference temperature
Tref.description: Reference temperature for the enthalpy integrals.  Only differences enter the balance.
